architecture.summary: Add llmModel String? to ScanResult Prisma model, pass model field through Tier2Payload and StoredScanResult interfaces, add composite index on (tier, llmModel, createdAt)

integrations.summary: N/A - no new external services. Existing CF AI and OpenAI integrations unchanged; only tracking which model was used

ui-ux.summary: N/A - admin API endpoint only, no frontend UI changes in scope

performance.summary: Composite DB index on (tier, llmModel, createdAt) for efficient stats queries over 769K+ rows

security.summary: Stats endpoint uses existing admin JWT auth pattern (requireAdmin + isAuthError guard)

edge-cases.summary: Nullable llmModel for backwards compat. Heuristic backfill: >30s=OpenAI inferred, 20-30s=ambiguous, <20s=CF inferred. Existing rows without model stay queryable
